prompt: Visionary UI concept image for the Purveyors website homepage, a premium coffee market-intelligence cockpit rather than a generic SaaS landing page. Wide desktop browser mockup, dark espresso and parchment palette with luminous amber and cyan market signals. Hero headline area reads: Source coffee with the whole market already mapped. Show top navigation for Catalog, Analytics, API, Docs, Sign in. Include a large central market map/chart card, a morning market pulse panel, origin benchmark cards, and a row of green coffee lot preview cards. Make it polished, high-end, editorial, investor-demo quality, realistic web UI screenshot, crisp details, no browser chrome, no watermarks.
style: premium fintech/data intelligence dashboard blended with specialty coffee editorial design
composition: wide desktop landing page, hero on left, immersive data cockpit on right, catalog cards along the bottom
lighting: dark cinematic interface glow with warm parchment highlights
constraints: no trademarked logos; no watermark; keep UI text minimal and legible; do not show real people

prompt: Visionary UI concept image for the Purveyors public Green Coffee Catalog page. Create a dense sourcing workspace for coffee buyers: left filter rail with Origin, Process, Supplier, Price, and member-only Process Transparency; top row market pulse and copy filtered link; main grid of rich coffee cards showing name, supplier, country, process, price per pound, confidence badge, similar lots action, and process evidence status. Use dark espresso background, parchment cards, amber price highlights, cyan confidence signals. It should look like a premium procurement terminal for specialty green coffee, not a simple ecommerce grid. Include anonymous gate copy: viewing 15 of 1,064 lots. No watermarks.
style: high-density procurement dashboard, elegant specialty coffee marketplace, premium data product
composition: left filter sidebar, two-column coffee card grid, top market brief, right-side compact insight widgets
lighting: subtle glassmorphism glow, warm paper cards against dark roast background
constraints: no trademarked logos; no watermark; avoid tiny unreadable paragraphs; UI text should be sparse and plausible

prompt: Visionary UI concept image for a Purveyors catalog coffee lot detail drawer opened over the catalog. Show a selected coffee lot detail panel with origin map, supplier traceability, process transparency timeline, fermentation/additive disclosure chips, pricing ladder, similar coffee recommendations, and a CTA to save to sourcing board. Keep context of catalog cards dimmed behind it. Premium dark espresso interface, parchment surfaces, amber prices, cyan confidence/evidence markers. The product should feel like Bloomberg Terminal for green coffee sourcing. No watermarks, no real brand logos except simple text Purveyors.
use_case: web app UI detail modal mockup
style: luxury data app with specialty coffee provenance storytelling
composition: large right-side drawer or centered modal over blurred catalog workspace, detail hierarchy clear
lighting: cinematic dark UI with warm rim lighting and subtle data glows
constraints: no trademarked logos; no watermark; no photos of identifiable people; keep rendered text concise

prompt: Visionary mobile UI concept image for the Purveyors Green Coffee Catalog. Tall smartphone app-like web screen showing a compact market pulse header, search bar, filter chips for Origin and Process, a swipeable coffee card stack, price movement badges, process confidence chips, and a bottom action bar for Catalog, Analytics, API, Account. Dark espresso and parchment palette with amber and cyan signals. Make it feel premium, fast, and buyer-focused for a roaster checking live green coffee availability on mobile. No watermark.
style: premium mobile procurement app, specialty coffee data product
composition: single tall mobile screen, market header at top, cards stacked vertically, sticky bottom nav
lighting: soft dark interface glow with warm coffee-toned cards
constraints: no trademarked logos; no watermark; no hands holding phone; concise readable UI labels

prompt: Visionary UI concept image for the Purveyors API and intelligence console connected to the catalog. Wide desktop UI showing an API key and usage dashboard, live endpoint cards for /v1/catalog and /v1/price-index, a response preview with structured green coffee fields, usage limits, and a small embedded catalog intelligence panel. Visual language should align with the redesigned homepage and catalog: dark espresso background, parchment panels, amber plan/limit highlights, cyan live-status indicators. Make it appealing to technical buyers and coffee data teams. No watermark.
style: premium API console plus market intelligence dashboard
composition: left navigation, central API usage cards and response preview, right intelligence summary panel
lighting: dark polished data-console lighting with subtle glow accents
constraints: no trademarked logos; no watermark; avoid exposing secrets; show masked API key only
